AlreadyListed().details: Reverts when a deposit is already listed.

DepositNotActive().details: Reverts when a deposit is not active.

DirectTransferRejected().details: Reverts when an ERC721 is sent without the listing flow.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

InvalidAddress().details: Reverts when an address parameter is zero.

InvalidNFT().details: Reverts when an NFT is not from the official SavingCore contract.

InvalidPrice().details: Reverts when a price is zero.

InvalidTerms().details: Reverts when terms are missing or do not match the current terms hash.

ListingNotFound().details: Reverts when a listing does not exist.

NotDepositOwner().details: Reverts when caller is not the current deposit NFT owner.

NotEscrowed().details: Reverts when the marketplace does not hold the listed NFT.

NotSeller().details: Reverts when caller is not the listing seller.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

RenewalMintRejected().details: Reverts when SavingCore tries to mint a renewed NFT into marketplace custody.

RestrictedWindow().details: Reverts when a deposit is inside the marketplace restricted window.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

SelfBuyNotAllowed().details: Reverts when the seller tries to buy their own listing.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

params.maxListings: Maximum listing slots to scan during this call.

cleanListings(uint256[]).details: Skips unlisted or still-valid deposit ids so off-chain cleanup can submit candidate batches safely.

params.depositIds: Deposit NFT ids to check and clean.

params._paymentToken: ERC20 token used for marketplace payments.
params._termsHash: Initial terms hash sellers must accept.

params.acceptedTermsHash: Terms hash accepted by the seller.
params.price: Sale price in the payment token's smallest unit.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.recipient: Account that should receive the NFT.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

expectedDepositIdPlusOne.details: Listing transfer guard: expected deposit id plus one while receiving the escrow NFT.

listingIndexPlusOne.details: Active listing array index plus one by deposit id. Zero means not listed.

Listed(uint256,address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Emitted when a deposit NFT is listed.

ListingCancelled(uint256,address).notice: Emitted when a seller cancels a listing.

ListingExpired(uint256,address).notice: Emitted when cleanup removes a stale listing.

ListingPurchased(uint256,address,address.notice: Emitted when a deposit NFT listing is purchased.

TermsHashUpdated(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Emitted when the required marketplace terms hash is updated.

UnlistedDepositRecovered(uint256,address.notice: Emitted when the owner recovers an unlisted NFT accidentally sent with raw transferFrom.

MAX_NO_LISTING_DAYS().notice: Upper bound for the restricted no-listing window in days.

MIN_NO_LISTING_DAYS().notice: Lower bound for the restricted no-listing window in days.

NO_LISTING_PERCENT().notice: Percent of deposit tenor used for the no-listing window.

buyDeposit(uint256).notice: Buys a listed deposit NFT with the configured payment token.

cancelListing(uint256).notice: Cancels a listing and returns the deposit NFT to the seller.

cleanExpiredListings(uint256).notice: Removes stale listings and returns escrowed NFTs to their sellers when possible.

cleanListings(uint256[]).notice: Removes specific stale listings and returns escrowed NFTs to their sellers.

cleanupCursor().notice: Cursor used by repeated cleanup calls to avoid always scanning from index zero.

constructor.notice: Initializes the marketplace with official protocol contracts and terms.

currentTermsHash().notice: Current marketplace terms hash sellers must accept when listing.

isListable(uint256).notice: Returns whether a deposit can currently be listed on this marketplace.

isListingStale(uint256).notice: Returns whether a listed deposit should be removed by cleanup.

listDeposit(uint256,uint256,bytes32).notice: Lists an eligible active deposit NFT and transfers it into marketplace escrow.

listedCount().notice: Returns the number of active listings.

listedDepositIds(uint256).notice: Active listed deposit ids used for cleanup scans and frontend reads.

listings(uint256).notice: Active listing by deposit NFT id.

noListingDays(uint256).notice: Returns the no-listing window for a deposit in days.

onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.notice: Receives official SavingCore NFTs only during marketplace listing transfers.

pause().notice: Pauses listing and buying during an emergency.

paymentToken().notice: ERC20 token used to pay sellers, expected to be USDC or MockUSDC.

recoverUnlistedDeposit(uint256,address).notice: Recovers an unlisted deposit NFT accidentally sent to the marketplace without safe listing flow.

savingCore().notice: Official SavingCore contract whose NFTs are accepted.

setTermsHash(bytes32).notice: Updates the marketplace terms hash sellers must accept for new listings.

unpause().notice: Unpauses listing and buying after an emergency is resolved.

userdoc.notice: Escrow marketplace for authentic SavingCore term-deposit NFTs.
